name: english-speaking-training-vscode
description: Standalone VS Code speaking-practice cockpit for local EnglishSpeakingTraining files.

englishTraining.pythonPath.description: Python executable used only for optional local progress completion.

englishTraining.timezone.description: Timezone used for daily package dates.

englishTraining.materialsSource.description: Practice material source. Auto uses a local EnglishSpeakingTraining root when available and falls back to GitHub when configured.

englishTraining.localMaterialsRoot.description: Optional absolute path to a local training materials root that contains prebuilt/. When set, the extension can read local materials from any VS Code workspace.

englishTraining.githubMaterialsBaseUrl.description: GitHub repo/tree URL or raw.githubusercontent.com base URL that contains the prebuilt/ practice materials folder.

englishTraining.coachProvider.description: Language-model provider used for transcript correction and follow-up generation.

englishTraining.audioUnderstandingProvid.description: Speech input provider used to understand or transcribe the VS Code recording.

englishTraining.ttsProvider.description: Speech output provider used to generate the native-version follow-along audio.

englishTraining.openaiTranscriptionModel.description: OpenAI model used for speech-to-text from the VS Code recorder.

englishTraining.openaiTtsModel.description: OpenAI model used for native-version follow-along audio.

englishTraining.openaiTtsVoice.description: OpenAI voice used for native-version follow-along audio.

englishTraining.geminiCoachModel.description: Gemini model used for correction and follow-up coaching.

englishTraining.geminiAudioUnderstanding.description: Gemini model used for speech input understanding.

englishTraining.geminiTtsModel.description: Gemini model used for native-version follow-along audio.

englishTraining.geminiTtsVoice.description: Gemini prebuilt voice name for native-version audio.

englishTraining.minimaxCoachModel.description: MiniMax model used for correction and follow-up coaching.

englishTraining.minimaxTtsModel.description: MiniMax speech model for native-version audio.

englishTraining.minimaxTtsVoiceId.description: MiniMax voice id for English follow-along audio.

englishTraining.mimoChatBaseUrl.description: Xiaomi MiMo OpenAI-compatible chat base URL.

englishTraining.mimoCoachModel.description: Xiaomi MiMo model used for correction and follow-up coaching.

englishTraining.mimoAudioUnderstandingMo.description: Xiaomi MiMo model used for speech input understanding.

englishTraining.mimoTtsModel.description: Xiaomi MiMo model used for native-version follow-along audio.

englishTraining.mimoTtsVoice.description: Xiaomi MiMo built-in voice used for native-version follow-along audio.

englishTraining.kimiChatBaseUrl.description: Kimi Code OpenAI-compatible chat base URL. Use a Kimi Code key for this endpoint.

englishTraining.kimiCoachModel.description: Kimi Code model used for correction and follow-up coaching.

englishTraining.deepseekCoachModel.description: DeepSeek model used for correction and follow-up coaching.

englishTraining.ttsSpeed.description: Playback speed used when generating follow-along TTS audio.

englishTraining.nativeRecorderFfmpegPath.description: ffmpeg executable used when VS Code webview microphone access is denied.

englishTraining.nativeRecorderFfmpegAudi.description: macOS AVFoundation audio device index for ffmpeg fallback recording. Use ffmpeg -f avfoundation -list_devices true -i "" to inspect devices.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
